clipboardHistory.value:
# Ensure it scans the UKI directory
SCAN_DIR="/boot/EFI/Linux"

# Example: If your system boots from the EFI directory
LIMINE_CONF="/boot/EFI/BOOT/limine.conf"

[UKI]
# The CachyOS Kernel
Linux = /boot/vmlinuz-linux-cachyos

# Your initramfs (usually generated by mkinitcpio or dracut)
Initrd = /boot/initramfs-linux-cachyos.img

# Zen 4 specific CPU microcode 
Microcode = /boot/amd-ucode.img

# The file containing your boot parameters
Cmdline = @/etc/kernel/cmdline

# System identification
OSRelease = @/etc/os-release

# The EFI stub that actually executes the image
Stub = /usr/lib/systemd/boot/efi/linuxx64.efi.stub

# Atuin Catppuccin Mocha Colors
set -gx ATUIN_LOG_LEVEL error
set -gx ATUIN_NO_UPDATE_CHECK true

# Customizing the UI colors via Env Vars
# These map to Catppuccin Mocha hex codes
set -gx ATUIN_COLOR_INDEX "89b4fa"      # Blue
set -gx ATUIN_COLOR_COMMAND "cdd6f4"    # Text
set -gx ATUIN_COLOR_DURATION "fab387"   # Peach
set -gx ATUIN_COLOR_TIMESTAMP "6c7086"  # Overlay0

## Atuin Config for Mayank

# Use the 'compact' style to save vertical space in Niri
style = "compact"

# Which search interface to use (default: fuzzy)
search_mode = "fuzzy"

# Where the filter bar should appear (top or bottom)
filter_mode_shell_up_key_binding = "session"

# Show a preview of the command's output/details
show_preview = true

# Use the arrow keys to navigate and Enter to execute
enter_accept = true

# =========================================
#             HISTORY SETTINGS
# =========================================
# Keep a massive history without slowing down
inline_height = 10
show_tabs = true
show_help = false

# Ignore specific commands from being saved to history
history_filter = [
   "^ls",
   "^cd",
   "^exit",
   "^clear"
]

# =========================================
#               SYNC SETTINGS
# =========================================
# If you use Atuin's free sync server
auto_sync = true
update_check = true

# Directory Colors
set -U tide_pwd_color_anchors 89b4fa
set -U tide_pwd_color_dirs cdd6f4
set -U tide_pwd_color_truncated_dirs a6adc8

# Git Status Colors
set -U tide_git_color_branch cba6f7
set -U tide_git_color_conflicted f38ba8
set -U tide_git_color_dirty f9e2af
set -U tide_git_color_operation f38ba8
set -U tide_git_color_staged a6e3a1
set -U tide_git_color_stash 74c7ec
set -U tide_git_color_untracked eba0ac
set -U tide_git_color_upstream 89dceb

# Timing & Status Colors
set -U tide_cmd_duration_color fab387
set -U tide_status_color f38ba8
set -U tide_status_color_failure f38ba8

# Context (User@Host) & OS Logo
set -U tide_context_color_default 89b4fa
set -U tide_context_color_root f38ba8
set -U tide_os_color 89b4fa

fisher install catppuccin/fish
fish_config theme choose catppuccin-mocha

# Install Fisher
curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jorgebucaran/fisher/main/functions/fisher.fish | source && fisher install jorgebucaran/fisher

# Install Tide
fisher install IlanCosman/tide@v6

# Top-level window configuration
position = "top"
anchor_to_edges = true
height = 30

# =========================================
#                LEFT MODULES
# =========================================

# 1. custom/launcher
[[start]]
type = "script"
mode = "poll"
interval = 86400000
cmd = "echo ' 󰣇 '"
on_click_left = "fuzzel"

# 2. custom/paru
[[start]]
type = "script"
mode = "poll"
interval = 3600000
cmd = "updates=$(checkupdates 2>/dev/null | wc -l); echo \"${updates:-0} 󰚰\""
on_click_left = "foot -e paru -Syu"

# 3. niri/workspaces
[[start]]
type = "workspaces"

# 4. clock
[[start]]
type = "clock"
format = "%I:%M %p  %d %b"


# =========================================
#               MIDDLE MODULES
# =========================================

# 5. wlr/taskbar
[[center]]
type = "launcher"
show_names = false
show_icons = true
icon_size = 18
favorites = []

# 6. idle_inhibitor (Mocked via script, requires wayland-idle-inhibitor daemon)
[[center]]
type = "script"
mode = "poll"
interval = 2000
cmd = "pidof wayland-idle-inhibitor >/dev/null && echo '  ' || echo '  '"
on_click_left = "killall wayland-idle-inhibitor || wayland-idle-inhibitor &"


# =========================================
#               RIGHT MODULES
# =========================================

# --- GROUP: PPD & SCX ---

# 7. power-profiles-daemon
[[end]]
type = "script"
mode = "poll"
interval = 2000
cmd = "profile=$(powerprofilesctl get 2>/dev/null); if [ \"$profile\" = \"performance\" ]; then echo '󰓅'; else echo '󰾆'; fi"

# 8. custom/scx
[[end]]
type = "script"
mode = "poll"
interval = 2000
cmd = "~/.config/waybar/scripts/scx-status.sh | jq -r '.text // empty' 2>/dev/null || ~/.config/waybar/scripts/scx-status.sh"
on_click_left = "~/.config/waybar/scripts/scx-cycle.sh"
on_click_right = "scxctl restart"

# --- GROUP: CPU, TEMP, RAM ---

# 9. cpu & memory (Native sys_info)
[[end]]
type = "sys_info"
interval = 2000
format = [
  "󰍛 {cpu_percent}%",
  " {memory_used}G/{memory_total}G {memory_percent}%"
]

# 10. temperature (Scripted to avoid coretemp path crashing on Zen 4)
[[end]]
type = "script"
mode = "poll"
interval = 2000
cmd = "sensors | awk '/^Tctl:/ {print \"󰔏 \" $2}' | sed 's/+//'"

# --- GROUP: GPU & VRAM ---

# 11. custom/gpu-icon & custom/gpu
[[end]]
type = "script"
mode = "poll"
interval = 2000
cmd = "gpu-usage-waybar | jq -r '.text // empty' 2>/dev/null || echo '󰢮'"
on_click_left = "foot -e amdgpu_top"

# --- GROUP: NVME ---

# 12. disk (Root Partition)
[[end]]
type = "script"
mode = "poll"
interval = 60000
cmd = "df -h / | awk 'NR==2 {print \"󰋊 \" $5}'"

# 13. custom/nvme-health
[[end]]
type = "script"
mode = "poll"
interval = 3600000
cmd = "~/.config/waybar/scripts/nvme-health.sh | jq -r '.text // empty' 2>/dev/null || ~/.config/waybar/scripts/nvme-health.sh"

# 14. custom/disk-read & disk-write
[[end]]
type = "script"
mode = "poll"
interval = 2000
cmd = "echo \"󰇚 $(~/.config/waybar/scripts/disk-io.sh read)/s  󰕒 $(~/.config/waybar/scripts/disk-io.sh write)/s\""

# --- GROUP: NETWORK ---

# 15. network (Native Network Manager)
[[end]]
type = "network_manager"
icon_size = 18

# --- GROUP: BLUETOOTH ---

# 16. bluetooth
[[end]]
type = "script"
mode = "poll"
interval = 5000
cmd = "bluetoothctl info | grep -q 'Connected: yes' && echo '󰂱' || echo '󰂯'"
on_click_left = "overskride"

# --- GROUP: BACKLIGHT, MIC & VOLUME ---

# 17. backlight
[[end]]
type = "script"
mode = "poll"
interval = 2000
cmd = "brightnessctl -m | awk -F, '{print \"󰃠 \" $4}'"

# 18. pulseaudio
[[end]]
type = "volume"
format = "{icon} {volume}%"

# 19. pulseaudio#microphone
[[end]]
type = "script"
mode = "poll"
interval = 2000
cmd = "wpctl get-volume @DEFAULT_AUDIO_SOURCE@ | grep -q MUTED && echo '' || wpctl get-volume @DEFAULT_AUDIO_SOURCE@ | awk '{print \" \" $2*100 \"%\"}'"

# --- GROUP: BATTERY ---

# 20. battery
[[end]]
type = "battery"
format = "{icon} {percentage}%"

# 21. battery#power (Pulling wattage directly from hardware)
[[end]]
type = "script"
mode = "poll"
interval = 2000
cmd = "cat /sys/class/power_supply/BAT*/power_now 2>/dev/null | awk '{printf \"󰂃 %.1fW\", $1/1000000}' || true"

# --- CUSTOM WLOGOUT ---

# 22. wlogout
[[end]]
type = "script"
mode = "poll"
interval = 86400000
cmd = "echo ' 󰐥 '"
on_click_left = "wlogout -b 4 -T 400 -B 400 -L 300 -R 300"

# Top-level window configuration
position = "top"
anchor_to_edges = true
height = 30

# =========================================
#                LEFT MODULES
# =========================================
[[start]]
type = "label"
name = "launcher"
label = " 󰣇 "
on_click = "fuzzel"

[[start]]
type = "script"
name = "paru"
mode = "poll"
interval = 3600000
cmd = "updates=$(checkupdates 2>/dev/null | wc -l); echo \"${updates:-0} 󰚰\""
on_click = "foot -e paru -Syu"

[[start]]
type = "workspaces"
name = "workspaces"

[[start]]
type = "clock"
name = "clock"
format = "%I:%M %p  %d %b"

# =========================================
#               MIDDLE MODULES
# =========================================
[[center]]
type = "focused"
name = "focused"
show_icon = true
show_title = false
icon_size = 18

[[center]]
type = "tray"
name = "tray"
icon_size = 14

# =========================================
#               RIGHT MODULES
# =========================================
[[end]]
type = "sys_info"
name = "sys_info"
interval = 2
format = [
  "󰍛 {cpu_percent}%",
  " {memory_percent}%"
]

[[end]]
type = "volume"
name = "volume"
format = "{icon} {volume}%"

[[end]]
type = "battery"
name = "battery"
format = "{icon} {percentage}%"

[[end]]
type = "label"
name = "wlogout"
label = " 󰐥 "
on_click = "wlogout -b 4 -T 400 -B 400 -L 300 -R 300"

# Ironbar Main Configuration
monitor = "all"
position = "top"
height = 30
margin_top = 2
margin_left = 4
margin_right = 4
spacing = 0

# =========================================
#                LEFT MODULES
# =========================================
[[start]]
type = "launcher"
icon = "󰣇"
command = "fuzzel"

[[start]]
type = "label"
# Equivalent to your custom/paru module
label = "{{3600:checkupdates 2>/dev/null | wc -l || echo '0'}} 󰚰"
on_click = "foot -e paru -Syu"

[[start]]
type = "workspaces"
# Note: Ironbar has native Niri support but limited;
# fallback to label scripts if native doesn't suit your exact icon set.
all_outputs = true
format = "{name}"

[[start]]
type = "clock"
format = "%I:%M %p %d %b"

# =========================================
#               MIDDLE MODULES
# =========================================
[[center]]
# Ironbar uses 'focused' for window titles/task management
type = "focused"
show_icon = true
show_title = true
icon_size = 18

[[center]]
type = "tray"
icon_size = 14

# =========================================
#               RIGHT MODULES
# =========================================
[[end]]
type = "sys_info"
interval = 2
# Combines CPU, Temp, and RAM into one module group
format = [
  "󰍛 {cpu_usage}%",
  "󰔏 {temp_c:coretemp:package_id_0}°C",
  " {memory_used}/{memory_total}GB"
]

[[end]]
type = "network"
format = "{icon} {essid}"
# Icons can be styled in style.css or used directly in format
on_click = "foot -e nmtui"

[[end]]
type = "volume"
format = "{icon} {volume}%"
on_click = "pwvucontrol"

[[end]]
type = "battery"
format = "{icon} {percentage}%"

[[end]]
type = "label"
# wlogout launcher
label = "󰐥"
on_click = "wlogout -b 4 -T 400 -B 400 -L 300 -R 300"

mayank@mynovo ~> scxctl list
supported schedulers: ["beerland", "bpfland", "cake", "cosmos", "flash", "lavd", "pandemonium", "p2dq", "tickless", "rustland", "rusty"]

mayank@mynovo ~> sudo mkinitcpio -P
==> Building image from preset: /etc/mkinitcpio.d/linux-cachyos.preset: 'default'
==> WARNING: No kernel version specified. Skipping image 'default'
==> Building image from preset: /etc/mkinitcpio.d/linux.preset: 'default'

==> WARNING: No kernel version specified. Skipping image 'default'
==> Building image from preset: /etc/mkinitcpio.d/linux.preset: 'default'
==> Using default configuration file: '/etc/mkinitcpio.conf'

PRESETS=('default')
default_config="/etc/mkinitcpio.conf"
default_image="/boot/initramfs-linux-cachyos.img"
# GIVE THIS A UNIQUE NAME
default_uki="/boot/EFI/Linux/cachyos-v4.efi" 
default_options="--splash /usr/share/systemd/bootctl/splashtop.bmp"

! PATH missing npm global bin dir: /home/mayank/.npm-global/bin
  This can make openclaw show as "command not found" in new terminals.
  Fix (zsh: ~/.zshrc, bash: ~/.bashrc):
    export PATH="/home/mayank/.npm-global/bin:$PATH"
